jiuwen.core.foundation

Contents

  • ModelClientConfig
    • ModelClientConfig
  • ModelRequestConfig

  • LLMClient

  • OpenAIClient
    • OpenAIClient
      • OpenAIClient.from_env()

jiuwen.core.foundation#

ModelClientConfig#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.ModelClientConfig#

Connection configuration for an LLM provider.

provider: str (default "")
api_key: str (default "")
api_base: str (default "")
verify_ssl: bool (default True)

ModelRequestConfig#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.ModelRequestConfig#

Request parameters for an LLM call.

model: str (default "")
temperature: float (default 0.7, range 0.0-2.0)
max_tokens: int (default 1024, min 1)
top_p: float (default 1.0, range 0.0-1.0)
stop: list[str] | None (default None)

LLMClient#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.LLMClient#

Abstract base class for LLM providers.

async chat(messages: list[dict], config: ModelRequestConfig | None = None) -> str
async chat_stream(messages: list[dict], config: ModelRequestConfig | None = None) -> AsyncIterator[str]

OpenAIClient#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.OpenAIClient(client_config: ModelClientConfig)#

Real LLM client using the OpenAI SDK.

classmethod from_env(env_file: str | None = None) → OpenAIClient#

Create client from .env / environment variables. Reads OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_BASE, OPENAI_MODEL.
